## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran. Run `pnpm run test:unit` and `pnpm run typecheck` before submitting.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run lint:guard` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] No secrets or credentials introduced
- [ ] Changes are limited in scope (no unrelated refactoring mixed in)
